function.name: tavily_search
function.description: Searches the web using the Tavily API, which returns AI-optimised search results with relevancy scores, content snippets, and optional LLM-generated answers, raw content, and images. Supports news, finance, and general search with time/domain/country filters. Use this instead of browser navigation when you need quick, structured answers from the web.

search_depth.description: Controls latency vs. relevance. 'basic' (default, 1 credit): balanced option. 'advanced' (2 credits): highest relevance with multi-snippet results. 'fast' (1 credit): prioritizes lower latency. 'ultra-fast' (1 credit): minimizes latency above all else.

max_results.description: Maximum number of search results to return (1-20). Defaults to 5.

topic.description: Search category. 'general' for broad search, 'news' for real-time updates (politics, sports, current events), 'finance' for financial content.

time_range.description: Filter results by publish/update date relative to now.

start_date.description: Return results published/updated on or after this date. Format: YYYY-MM-DD.

end_date.description: Return results published/updated on or before this date. Format: YYYY-MM-DD.

include_answer.description: Include an LLM-generated answer to the query. 'basic' for a quick answer, 'advanced' for a more detailed answer.

include_raw_content.description: Include cleaned page content per result. 'markdown' returns search result content in markdown format, 'text' returns plain text.

include_images.description: Include images in the response (both query-level images and per-result images from each source).

include_domains.description: List of domains to specifically include in search results (max 300). Only results from these domains will be returned.

exclude_domains.description: List of domains to exclude from search results (max 150).

country.description: Boost search results from a specific country (e.g. 'united states', 'united kingdom', 'japan', 'australia', 'germany'). Only available when topic is 'general'.

auto_parameters.description: When enabled, Tavily automatically configures search parameters based on your query's content and intent. Explicit values override automatic ones. Note: search_depth may be upgraded to 'advanced', costing 2 credits.

exact_match.description: Only return results containing the exact quoted phrase(s) in the query, bypassing synonyms or semantic variations. Wrap target phrases in quotes within the query (e.g. "John Smith" CEO Acme Corp).
